patterns.prompt_template: Build a top-down shooter. Player moves with WASD/Arrows, shoot with Space. Spawn enemy waves. Coins drop. Add screen shake + hit flash. Add score + combo.

Build a survivor arena game. Player moves with WASD/Arrows, auto-fires or directional attacks, enemy waves intensify over time, pickups and upgrades appear, and the game includes score, hit flash, screen shake, and a clean HUD.
